attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WI_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WI_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WI_INCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,WI_INCR.GL_DTM                        
,WI_INCR.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT 
,WI_INCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT       
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT       
,WI_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,WI_INCR.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD          
,WI_INCR.SS_CD                         
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,(WI_INCR.SLS_COMM_PCT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS SLS_COMM_PCT                 
,REST_BKG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT
,'R' AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG 
,WI_INCR.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WI_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,WI_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       
,WI_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,WI_INCR.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        
,WI_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WI_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
,WI_INCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            
,WI_INCR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,WI_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,(WI_INCR.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT         
,(WI_INCR.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT        
,WI_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,WI_INCR.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,WI_INCR.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,WI_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     
,WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI_INCR.ELA_FLG                       
,WI_INCR.XCAT_FLG                      
,WI_INCR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,WI_INCR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI_INCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI_INCR.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD        
,WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
,WI_INCR.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY         
,(WI_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT 
,WI_INCR.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,WI_INCR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,WI_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
,WI_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WI_INCR.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WI_INCR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEF_REV_INCR WI_INCR
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT REST_BKG 
ON   REST_BKG.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY 
AND  REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND  REST_BKG.LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y' 
AND  REST_BKG.REV_HIST_RESTATED_FLAG = 'Y'
AND  REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'AR'
AND  REST_BKG.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY > 0 
WHERE INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG IN ('R')
AND WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY>0

SELECT
WI_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WI_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WI_INCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,WI_INCR.GL_DTM                        
,WI_INCR.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT 
,WI_INCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT       
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT       
,WI_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,WI_INCR.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD          
,WI_INCR.SS_CD                         
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,(WI_INCR.SLS_COMM_PCT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS SLS_COMM_PCT                 
,REST_BKG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT
,'R' AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG
,WI_INCR.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WI_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,WI_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       
,WI_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,WI_INCR.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        
,WI_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WI_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
,WI_INCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            
,WI_INCR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,WI_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,(WI_INCR.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT         
,(WI_INCR.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT        
,WI_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,WI_INCR.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,WI_INCR.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,WI_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     
,WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI_INCR.ELA_FLG                       
,WI_INCR.XCAT_FLG                      
,WI_INCR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,WI_INCR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI_INCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI_INCR.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD        
,WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
,WI_INCR.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY         
,(WI_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT 
,WI_INCR.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,WI_INCR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,WI_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
,WI_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WI_INCR.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WI_INCR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH,
$$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEF_REV_INCR WI_INCR
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT  REST_BKG 
ON REST_BKG.RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT = WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT 
AND REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND REST_BKG.LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y' 
AND REST_BKG.REV_HIST_RESTATED_FLAG = 'Y'
AND REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE ='POS'
AND REST_BKG.RU_BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT > 0
WHERE INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG IN ('V') 
AND WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <> 'WW Distribution' 
AND WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT > 0

SELECT
WI_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WI_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WI_INCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,WI_INCR.GL_DTM                        
,WI_INCR.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT 
,WI_INCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT       
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT       
,WI_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,WI_INCR.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD          
,WI_INCR.SS_CD                         
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,(WI_INCR.SLS_COMM_PCT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS SLS_COMM_PCT                 
,REST_BKG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT
,'R' AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG
,WI_INCR.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WI_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,WI_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       
,WI_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,WI_INCR.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        
,WI_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WI_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
,WI_INCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            
,WI_INCR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,WI_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,(WI_INCR.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT         
,(WI_INCR.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT        
,WI_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,WI_INCR.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,WI_INCR.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,WI_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     
,WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI_INCR.ELA_FLG                       
,WI_INCR.XCAT_FLG                      
,WI_INCR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,WI_INCR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI_INCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI_INCR.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD        
,WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
,WI_INCR.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY         
,(WI_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT 
,WI_INCR.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,WI_INCR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,WI_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
,WI_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WI_INCR.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WI_INCR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEF_REV_INCR WI_INCR
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT REST_BKG  
ON  REST_BKG.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
AND REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND REST_BKG.LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y' 
AND REST_BKG.REV_HIST_RESTATED_FLAG = 'Y'
AND REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'AR'
AND REST_BKG.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY > 0
AND REST_BKG.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
AND REST_BKG.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 
WHERE INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG IN ('C')  
AND WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY > 0
AND WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
AND WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0

SELECT
WI_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WI_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WI_INCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,WI_INCR.GL_DTM                        
,WI_INCR.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT 
,WI_INCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT       
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT

,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY

,WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

,REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT
,'R' AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG
,WI_INCR.GL_POSTED_DT

,WI_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       
,WI_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,WI_INCR.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        
,WI_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WI_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
,WI_INCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            
,WI_INCR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,WI_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,(WI_INCR.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT         
,(WI_INCR.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT        
,WI_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,WI_INCR.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,WI_INCR.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,WI_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     
,WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI_INCR.ELA_FLG                       
,WI_INCR.XCAT_FLG                      
,WI_INCR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,WI_INCR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI_INCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI_INCR.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD        
,WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
,WI_INCR.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY         
,(WI_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT 
,WI_INCR.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,WI_INCR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,WI_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
,WI_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WI_INCR.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WI_INCR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEF_REV_INCR WI_INCR
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT  REST_BKG  
ON  REST_BKG.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND REST_BKG.LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y' 
AND REST_BKG.REV_HIST_RESTATED_FLAG = 'Y'
AND REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP','XAAS')
AND REST_BKG.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0
AND REST_BKG.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
WHERE INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG IN ('S')    
AND WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0 
AND WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT
WI_INCR.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WI_INCR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WI_INCR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,WI_INCR.GL_DTM                        
,WI_INCR.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT 
,WI_INCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT       
,(WI_INCR.DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT       
,WI_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI_INCR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,WI_INCR.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD          
,WI_INCR.SS_CD                         
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
,WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY         
,(WI_INCR.SLS_COMM_PCT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS SLS_COMM_PCT                 
,REST_BKG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT AS RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT
,'R' AS DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG
,WI_INCR.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_FLG                   
,WI_INCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,WI_INCR.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WI_INCR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER       
,WI_INCR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,WI_INCR.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD        
,WI_INCR.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,WI_INCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
,WI_INCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            
,WI_INCR.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,WI_INCR.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE      
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT 
,(WI_INCR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,(WI_INCR.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT         
,(WI_INCR.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT        
,WI_INCR.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,WI_INCR.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,WI_INCR.BK_DEAL_ID                    
,WI_INCR.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID     
,WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WI_INCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WI_INCR.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI_INCR.ELA_FLG                       
,WI_INCR.XCAT_FLG                      
,WI_INCR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,WI_INCR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI_INCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI_INCR.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD        
,WI_INCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT                
,WI_INCR.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY         
,(WI_INCR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT * COALESCE(REST_BKG.RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT, 100)/100) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT 
,WI_INCR.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,WI_INCR.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG            
,WI_INCR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD 
,WI_INCR.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,WI_INCR.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WI_INCR.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WI_INCR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEF_REV_INCR WI_INCR
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_RSTD_BKGS_SLS_CRDT_ASGMT  REST_BKG  
ON  REST_BKG.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND REST_BKG.ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI_INCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND REST_BKG.LATEST_REV_RESTATED_FLG = 'Y' 
AND REST_BKG.RESTATEMENT_LEVEL_FLAG = 'H'
AND REST_BKG.BOOKINGS_TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('ERP')
AND REST_BKG.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0
AND REST_BKG.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
WHERE INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG IN ('E')    
AND WI_INCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY > 0 
AND WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY < 0
UNION ALL

,WRDEF.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    
,WRDEF.COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT 
,WRDEF.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT    
,WRDEF.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG 
,WRDEF.DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,WRDEF.BK_DEAL_ID   
,WRDEF.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
,WRDEF.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,WRDEF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD 
,WRDEF.EDW_CREATE_DTM    
,WRDEF.EDW_CREATE_USER   
,WRDEF.EDW_UPDATE_DTM    
,WRDEF.EDW_UPDATE_USER   
,WRDEF.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
,WRDEF.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WRDEF.ELA_FLG 
,WRDEF.XCAT_FLG
,WRDEF.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG 
,WRDEF.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,WRDEF.DV_PRODUCT_KEY    
,WRDEF.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WRDEF.ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD   
,WRDEF.POS_TRX_ID_INT    
,WRDEF.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY    
,WRDEF.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT 
,WRDEF.POB_TYPE_CD  
,WRDEF.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,WRDEF.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,WRDEF.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY    
,WRDEF.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY
,WRDEF.ACTION_CODE
,WRDEF.DML_TYPE
,WRDEF.REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,WRDEF.NET_PRICE_FLG
,WRDEF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID
,WRDEF.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,WRDEF.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_RSTD_DEFERRED_REVENUE_SFP WRDEF
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON WRDEF.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH
ON WRDEF.RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS
ON NPOS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WRDEF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NPOS.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG ='Y'
AND NPOS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN ( -6666 , -7777 )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS DRVD_POS
ON DRVD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND DRVD_POS.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'POS' , 'DSV_POS' )
AND DRVD_POS.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD IN ( 'BUNDLE' , 'STANDALONE' )
AND DRVD_POS.POS_OFFSET_FLG = 'N'
AND DRVD_POS.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG = 'Y'
AND DRVD_POS.DV_LATEST_FLG = 'Y' /* For 201908, we have WW DIST - check with Lalith if we need to restrict */
WHERE WRDEF.NET_PRICE_FLG = 'Y'
AND WRDEF.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('INV','CM','DM')
AND NSO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE = 'Two Tier Distributor'
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE =  'WW Distribution'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID ORDER BY TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID)=1

SELECT
AR_TRX_KEY   ,
AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   ,
GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    ,
GL_DTM,
PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT ,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT    ,
DEF_REV_USD_CREDIT_AMT   ,
DEF_REV_USD_DEBIT_AMT    ,
PRODUCT_KEY  ,
BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE_CD,
SS_CD ,
SALES_ORDER_KEY   ,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
SLS_COMM_PCT ,
RSTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
RESTATED_SLS_CRDT_SPLIT_PCT   ,
DV_RSTD_ACTUAL_FLG,
GL_POSTED_DT ,
SERVICE_FLG  ,
BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,
BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,
SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER  ,
OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,
TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD   ,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE,
BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE    ,
FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE ,
GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT ,
INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMT,
DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG ,
DV_UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
BK_DEAL_ID   ,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,
EDW_CREATE_USER   ,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM    ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER   ,
DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
ELA_FLG ,
XCAT_FLG,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG ,
BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
DV_PRODUCT_KEY    ,
SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
ADJUSTMENT_TRX_TYPE_CD   ,
POS_TRX_ID_INT    ,
DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY    ,
DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT   ,
POB_TYPE_CD  ,
NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD    ,
ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY ,
MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY,
ACTION_CODE  ,
DML_TYPE,
REV_RSDL_TRX_LN_GL_DISTRI_KEY ,
NET_PRICE_FLG,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_RSTD_DEFERRED_REVENUE
WHERE NET_PRICE_FLG = 'Y'
AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('INV','CM','DM')
